# LLMs.txt - Reference Index

This directory contains reference documentation for implementing the everything-dev application.

## Quick Links

### Architecture & Planning
- [Milestone 1](../plan/milestone-1.md) - Host Auth, Principals, Identity Foundation
- [Milestone 2](../plan/milestone-2.md) - Core App Schema + Browse Pages  
- [Milestone 3](../plan/milestone-3.md) - Spaces, Publications, Grants, Public Routes

### Domain References
- [Better Auth Organization Plugin](./better-auth-org.md) - Org/team plugin details
- [Principals and Authorization](./principals-authz.md) - Principal-based auth model
- [oRPC Contracts](./orpc-contracts.md) - Contract definition patterns

### UI Patterns
- [Generic Inspector](./generic-inspector.md) - Resource detail page pattern
- [Search and URL Params](./search-url-patterns.md) - Filter persistence in URLs

## Original Spec Context

The implementation plan is based on the user's specification which defined:

### Auth Model
- Better-auth owns: users, sessions, organizations, members, teams, team members, invitations
- App layer owns: workspaces, spaces, things, publications, edges, assets, views, activity, search
- Principals: `user:{id}`, `organization:{id}`, `team:{id}`
- Grants on workspaces/spaces use principals

### API Design
- Generic, stable oRPC contract
- Federated remote-friendly
- Principal-based authz
- Every resource returns `permissions` set

### UI Requirements
- React + TypeScript
- TanStack Router + Query
- shadcn/ui + Tailwind
- Effect.TS for workflows
- Minimal black/white visual style
- Generic inspector always present
- Plugin rendering is additive only

### Route Tree
- Home, Search, Types, Spaces, Workspaces, Views, Activity, Generator, Me
- Workspaces: list, detail, things, views, grants, create
- Spaces: list, detail, things, views, grants, create, public route
- Things: detail, edit, publish, assets
- Views: list, detail
- Public: `/s/$spaceKey/$slug`

### Core Resources
- **Types** - Define thing structure, schema, capabilities
- **Workspaces** - Scoped containers for things
- **Spaces** - Publication targets with host/key routing
- **Things** - Core content with type, relations, publications, assets
- **Publications** - Thing publications into spaces
- **Edges** - Relations between things
- **Assets** - Uploadable files attached to things
- **Views** - Saved queries with layouts
- **Activity** - Event feed
- **Grants** - Principal-based permissions

## File Organization

```
plan/
├── milestone-1.md          # Phase 1: Auth foundation
├── milestone-2.md          # Phase 2: Core graph
└── milestone-3.md          # Phase 3: Publications + workflows

reference/
├── llms.txt                # This index
├── better-auth-org.md      # Better Auth plugin reference
├── principals-authz.md     # Authorization model
├── orpc-contracts.md       # oRPC patterns
├── generic-inspector.md    # UI inspector pattern
└── search-url-patterns.md  # URL filter patterns
```

## Implementation Order

1. **Milestone 1** (Foundation)
   - Host auth with org/teams
   - Principal resolution
   - Identity/permissions API

2. **Milestone 2** (Core Graph)
   - Type defs, workspaces, things schema
   - Query factories
   - Generic inspector components
   - Browse/detail routes

3. **Milestone 3** (Publication Layer)
   - Spaces, publications, edges, assets
   - Effect workflows (publish, upload, generator)
   - Public routes
   - Grant management

## Key Principles

1. **Auth Truth in Host:** Better Auth owns all user/org/team state
2. **App Schema Separate:** App tables only store resource data and grants
3. **Generic Inspector:** Always render all fields + raw JSON
4. **URL-Backed Filters:** All list filters in URL params
5. **Type Inference:** UI infers types from oRPC contract
6. **Effect for Workflows:** Use Effect for multi-step, cancellable flows
7. **Cross-Link Everything:** Every resource links to related resources

## Stack

- **Host:** Hono.js, Better Auth, Drizzle, SQLite
- **API:** every-plugin, oRPC, Effect-TS, Drizzle
- **UI:** React 19, TanStack Router/Query, shadcn/ui, Tailwind v4
- **Module Federation:** Rsbuild + Module Federation for remotes

## External Documentation

- Better Auth: https://www.better-auth.com/docs/plugins/organization
- oRPC: https://orpc.dev
- TanStack Router: https://tanstack.com/router/latest
- Effect: https://effect.website
